description: Clean English text, low risk — should pass
text: A possible medication duplication has been identified. We recommend you consult your pharmacist to clarify this point.

description: Contains forbidden English phrase 'stop taking' — should fail
text: Stop taking ibuprofen right away as it may interact with your blood thinner.

description: Contains forbidden Spanish phrase 'deje de tomar' — should fail (bilingual detection)
text: Deje de tomar el ibuprofeno inmediatamente, ya que puede interferir con su anticoagulante.

description: HIGH-risk output with all three required English phrases and no forbidden phrases — should pass
text: A discrepancy has been detected that requires professional review. Do not change medication without consulting your doctor or nurse. Please bring this information to your clinician at your next appointment.

description: HIGH-risk output missing required phrases — should fail
text: An important discrepancy has been detected. Please consult your doctor when you can.

description: Forbidden safety claim 'it is safe to take' — should fail
text: Ibuprofen is an over-the-counter medication, it is safe to take for pain.
